stemHtml: A pilot is flying IFR in VMC and experiences radio communication failure. The ATC has cleared the pilot to descend to FL40 at the IAF for an ILS approach to runway 07 and give a report when crossing FL100. What procedure should the pilot follow?

options.b: Maintain FL100 until reaching the IAF, then descend.
options.c: Descend to FL40, hold at the IAF, and approach to land within 20 minutes after the ETA.
options.d: Descend to FL40, squawk 7600, and land as soon as possible.
